title: S&P 500 Sinks as Fresh AI Worries Hit Financials; Nvidia Gains
description: US stocks tumbled on Monday as fresh concerns about the impact of artificial intelligence hit financial and software companies, while President Donald Trump’s move to impose a new, across-the-board levy on US imports sowed confusion around global trade. Shares of Nvidia Corp. gained ahead of Wednesday’s earnings report.
content: US stocks tumbled on Monday as fresh concerns about the impact of artificial intelligence hit financial and software companies, while President Donald Trump’s move to impose a new, across-the-board levy on US imports sowed confusion around global trade. Shares of Nvidia Corp. gained ahead of Wednesday’s earnings report.
